Resolves #12588

Authored by Claude Opus 4.8 (Claude Code). Session 0f6d0fa0-327f-42ec-b970-e32f388699b4.

Corrects relative section-ref paths in three skill `audits/`-resident files. They referenced the sibling `references/` directory as `references/<file>.md ¬ßN` (skill-root-relative), but from `audits/` the resolvable path is `../references/<file>.md ¬ßN`. ~13 refs across 3 files; a pure relative-path correction ‚Äî no anchor or prose-content change. This is the legitimate path-fix PR #12581 originally attempted (dropped pre-merge when its bundled ¬ß-ref restyle was flagged in review).

Evidence: L1 (static lint audit ‚Äî `lint-skill-manifest --base HEAD~1` ‚Üí OK; every rewritten target + numeric anchor resolves) ‚Üí L1 required (doc-path correctness, no runtime ACs). No residuals.

**Micro-change exemption (¬ß6.1):** pure documentation, no runtime impact ‚Äî cross-family review welcome but not merge-gating.

## Deltas from ticket
None ‚Äî implements #12588 one-to-one.

## Slot-Rationale (Substrate-Mutation Pre-Flight ‚Äî AGENTS.md ¬ß13)
Touches `.agents/skills/ideation-sandbox/audits/consensus-mandate.md`, `.agents/skills/ideation-sandbox/audits/tier-2-revalidation.md`, `.agents/skills/pull-request/audits/consensus-gate-mirror.md` ‚Äî conditionally-loaded World-Atlas audit files (read-on-demand, **not** always-loaded turn substrate).
- **Modified (all 3 files):** disposition `rewrite` ‚Äî corrected the relative path of existing section-refs (`references/` ‚Üí `../references/`). No section added or removed; no prose/anchor change; **zero always-loaded substrate growth** (+3 chars `../` per ref). Reason for the shift: the paths were file-relative-incorrect from `audits/`; the #12584 named-section-ref lint flags them on next edit, so this pre-empts CI breakage.

## Test Evidence
- `node ai/scripts/lint/lint-skill-manifest.mjs --base HEAD~1` ‚Üí `[lint-skill-manifest] OK` (exit 0).
- Seam grep: 0 broken `references/‚Ä¶¬ß` refs remain in the three `audits/` files; the 13 refs now use `../references/‚Ä¶¬ß`, all targets + numeric anchors resolving.
- Pure docs ‚Äî no unit/e2e tests apply.
